
## [2026-06-28] stub | 222 vendor stubs generated from registry
- Built a canonical vendor-slug registry (~scratchpad) and a deterministic generator; emitted 222 vendor stubs to `wiki/vendors/` with full frontmatter (`status: stub`, multi-category tags, primary-category layer/priority inherited).
- Seed M&A flags propagated to `ownership: acquired` + `ownership_confidence: low` + an UNVERIFIED note where the seed flagged an acquisition (to confirm in Phase 3).
- Known duplicate to resolve in research: `robust-intelligence` ≡ `cisco-ai-defense` (Robust Intelligence → Cisco AI Defense). Also `conjur` is a CyberArk product page, cross-link to `cyberark`.
